entrance.title: Sing a New Song
entrance.lyrics:
Chorus
Sing a new song unto the Lord;
Let your song be sung
from mountains high
Sing a new song unto the Lord
Singing alleluia

Verse 1
Yahweh's people dance for joy
O come before the Lord
And play for him on glad tambourines
And let your trumpet sound

Chorus 2
Sing a new song unto the Lord;
Let your song be sung
from mountains high
Sing a new song unto the Lord
Singing alleluia

Verse 2
Rise, O children, from your sleep;
Your Savior now has come
He has turned your sorrow to joy
And filled your soul with song

Chorus 3
Sing a new song unto the Lord;
Let your song be sung
from mountains high
Sing a new song unto the Lord
Singing Alleluia
Singing Alleluia

entrance.title: All Creatures of Our God and King
entrance.lyrics:
Verse 1
All creatures of our God and King
Lift up your voice and with us sing
O praise Him! Alleluia!
Thou, burning sun with golden beam
Thou, silver moon with softer gleam
O praise Him! O praise Him!
Alleluia! Alleluia! Alleluia!

Verse 2
Let all things their Creator bless
And worship Him in humbleness
O praise Him! Alleluia!
Praise, praise the Father, praise the Son
And praise the Spirit, Three-in-One
O praise Him! O praise Him!
Alleluia! Alleluia! Alleluia!

Verse 3
All the redeemed washed by His blood
Come and rejoice in His great love
O praise Him! Alleluia!
Christ has defeated every sin
Cast all your burdens now on Him
O praise Him! O praise Him!
Alleluia! Alleluia! Alleluia!

Verse 4
He shall return in pow’r to reign
Heaven and earth will join to say
O praise Him! Alleluia!
Then who shall fall on bended knee?
All creatures of our God and King
O praise Him! O praise Him!
Alleluia! Alleluia! Alleluia!

entrance.title: Here I Am, Lord
entrance.lyrics:
I, the Lord of sea and sky,
I have heard my people cry.
All who dwell in dark and sin,
my hand will save.

I who made the stars of night,
I will make their darkness bright.
Who will bear my light to them?
Whom shall I send?

Here I am, Lord.
Is it I, Lord?
I have heard you calling in the night.
I will go, Lord,
if you lead me.
I will hold your people in my heart.

I, the Lord of snow and rain,
I have borne my people's pain.
I have wept for love of them,
they turn away.

I will break their hearts of stone,
give them hearts for love alone.
I will speak my word to them.
Whom shall I send?

Here I am, Lord.
Is it I, Lord?
I have heard you calling in the night.
I will go, Lord,
if you lead me.
I will hold your people in my heart.

I, the Lord of wind and flame,
I will tend the poor and lame.
I will set a feast for them.
My hand will save.

Finest bread I will provide
till their hearts be satisfied.
I will give my life to them.
Whom shall I send?

Here I am, Lord.
Is it I, Lord?
I have heard you calling in the night.
I will go, Lord,
if you lead me.
I will hold your people in my heart.

entrance.title: Glory and Praise to Our God
entrance.author: Dan Schutte
entrance.lyrics:
Verse 1
Glory and praise to our God
Who alone gives light to our days
Many are the blessings He bears
To those who trust in His ways

Verse 2
We the daughters and sons of Him
Who built the valleys and plains
Praise the wonders our God has done
In every heart that sings

Verse 3
Glory and praise to our God
Who alone gives light to our days
Many are the blessings He bears
To those who trust in His ways

Verse 4
In His wisdom He strengthens us
Like gold that's tested in fire
Though the power of sin prevails
Our God is there to save

Verse 5
Glory and praise to our God
Who alone gives light to our days
Many are the blessings He bears
To those who trust in His ways

Verse 6
God has watered our barren land
And spent His merciful rain
Now our rivers of life run full
For anyone to drink

Verse 7
Glory and praise to our God
Who alone gives light to our days
Many are the blessings He bears
To those who trust in His ways

entrance.title: Joyful, Joyful, We Adore Thee
entrance.lyrics:
Joyful, joyful, we adore thee,
God of glory, Lord of love;
hearts unfold like flowers before thee,
hailing thee, the sun above.

Melt the clouds of sin and sadness,
drive the dark of doubt away;
giver of immortal gladness,
fill us with the light of day.

All thy works with joy surround thee,
earth and heav'n reflect thy rays,
stars and angels sing around thee,
center of unbroken praise.

Field and forest, vale and mountain,
flowery meadow, flashing sea,
chanting bird and flowing fountain,
call us to rejoice in thee.

Thou art giving and forgiving,
ever blessing, ever blest,
well-spring of the joy of living,
ocean depth of happy rest!

Thou our Father, Christ our brother—
all who live in love are thine;
teach us how to love each other,
lift us to the joy divine.

Mortals, join the mighty chorus,
which the morning stars began;
love divine is reigning o'er us,
leading to the light of man.

entrance.title: Holy, Holy, Holy
entrance.lyrics:
Holy, holy, holy! Lord God Almighty!
Early in the morning our song shall rise to thee;
holy, holy, holy! Merciful and mighty!
God in three Persons, blessed Trinity!

Holy, holy, holy! All the saints adore thee,
casting down their golden crowns around the glassy sea;
cherubim and seraphim falling down before thee,
who wert and art and evermore shalt be.

Holy, holy, holy! Though the darkness hide thee,
though the eye of sinful man thy glory may not see,
only thou art holy; there is none beside thee,
perfect in power, in love, and purity.

Holy, holy, holy! Lord God Almighty!
All thy works shall praise thy name, in earth and sky and sea;
holy, holy, holy! Merciful and mighty!
God in three Persons, blessed Trinity!

entrance.title: Crown Him with Many Crowns
entrance.lyrics:
Crown him with many crowns,
the Lamb upon his throne;
hark! how the heavenly anthem drowns
all music but its own.
Awake, my soul, and sing
of him who died for thee,
and hail him as thy matchless King
through all eternity.

Crown him the Lord of life,
who triumphed o'er the grave,
and rose victorious in the strife
for those he came to save.
His glories now we sing,
who died and rose on high,
who died, eternal life to bring,
and lives that death may die.

Crown him the Lord of peace,
whose power a scepter sways
from pole to pole, that wars may cease,
and all be prayer and praise.
His reign shall know no end,
and round his pierced feet
fair flowers of paradise extend
their fragrance ever sweet.

entrance.title: Praise to the Lord, the Almighty
entrance.lyrics:
Praise to the Lord, the Almighty, the King of creation!
O my soul, praise him, for he is your health and salvation!
All you who hear, now to his altar draw near,
joining in glad adoration.

Praise to the Lord, who o'er all things is wondrously reigning,
and, as on wings of an eagle, uplifting, sustaining.
Have you not seen all that is needful has been
sent by his gracious ordaining?

Praise to the Lord, who will prosper your work and defend you;
surely his goodness and mercy shall daily attend you.
Ponder anew what the Almighty can do,
who with his love will befriend you.

Praise to the Lord! O let all that is in me adore him!
All that has life and breath, come now with praises before him!
Let the amen sound from his people again;
gladly forever adore him!

entrance.title: Awit ng Paghahangad
entrance.lyrics:
Verse 1
Oh Diyos, Ikaw ang laging hanap
Loob ko'y Ikaw ang tanging hangad
Nauuhaw akong parang tigang na lupa
Sa tubig ng 'Yong pag-aaruga

Verse 2
Ika'y pagmamasdan sa dakong banal
Nang makita ko ang 'Yong pagkarangal
Dadalangin akong nakataas aking kamay
Magagalak na aawit ng papuring iaalay

Chorus
Gunita ko'y Ikaw habang nahihimlay
Pagkat ang tulong Mo sa tuwina'y taglay
Sa lilim ng Iyong mga pakpak
Umaawit akong buong galak

Verse 3
Aking kaluluwa'y kumakapit sa 'Yo
Kaligtasa'y t'yak kong hawak Mo ako
Magdiriwang ang hari ang Diyos S'yang dahilan
Ang sa Iyo ay nangakong galak yaong makakamtan

Chorus 2
Gunita ko'y Ikaw habang nahihimlay
Pagkat ang tulong Mo sa tuwina'y taglay
Sa lilim ng Iyong mga pakpak
Umaawit akong buong galak

Verse 4
Umaawit, umaawit
Umaawit akong buong galak

entrance.title: Here We Are
entrance.author: Don Moen
entrance.lyrics:
Chorus
Here we are Lifting our hands to You
Here we are Giving You thanks for all You do
And as we praise And worship Your Holy name
You are here Dwelling within our praise

Verse 1
For every answered prayer (for every answered prayer)
For always being there (oh Lord, You′re always there)
For love that hears us when we call
For arms that lift us when we fall, oh
You have always been right beside us
Leading us all along the way
And we've made it through (we made it through)
Because of You

Chorus 2
And here we are Lifting our hands to You
Here we are Giving You thanks for all You do
And as we praise And worship Your Holy name
You are here, You are here
Dwelling within our praise

Verse 2
For days, we cannot see (for days we cannot see)
For all that′s yet to be (so much is yet to be)
The trials we may have to face
When we'll be leaning on Your grace, oh yes
It will be Your strength that saves us
Your love that makes us strong
And through it all (through it all)
We'll sing this song

Chorus 3
And here we are Lifting our hands to You, oh we worship
Here we are Giving You thanks for all You do
And as we praise And worship your Holy name
You are here, You are here
Dwelling within our praise, oh yes, You are

Verse 3
You are here
Dwelling within our praise
You are here
Dwelling within our praise
Oh yes, You are
Yes, You are (oh, we praise Your name)
Oh, we worship You Lord (oh, we worship You)

entrance.title: Purihin ang Panginoon
entrance.lyrics:
Chorus
Purihin ang panginoon umawit ng kagalakan
At tugtugin ang gitara at ang kaaya-ayang lira
Hipan ninyo ang trumpeta

Verse 1
Sa ating pagkabagabag sa Diyos tayo'y tumawag
Sa ating mga kaaway tayo ay kanyang iniligtas

Chorus 2
Purihin ang panginoon umawit ng kagalakan
At tugtugin ang gitara at ang kaaya-ayang lira
Hipan ninyo ang trumpeta

Verse 2
Ang pasaning mabigat sa 'ting mga balikat
Pinagaan nang lubusan ng Diyos na tagapagligtas

Chorus 3
Purihin ang panginoon umawit ng kagalakan
At tugtugin ang gitara at ang kaaya-ayang lira
Hipan ninyo ang trumpeta

offertory.title: Christify
offertory.lyrics:
Verse 1
Christify the gifts we bring to you
Bounty of the earth receive anew
Take and bless the work of our hands
Christify these gifts at your command

Verse 2
Sun and moon and earth and wind and rain
All the world's contained in every grain
All the toil and dreams of humankind
All we are we bring as bread and wine

Verse 3
Turn the bread and wine our hearts implore (turn the bread and wine our hearts implore)
To the living presence of the lord (to the living presence of the lord)
Blessed and broken shared with all in need (blessed and broken shared with all in need)
All our hungers sacred bread will feed

Verse 4
With this bread and wine you christify (with this bread and wine you christify)
Now our deepest thirst you satisfy (now our deepest thirst you satisfy)
We who by this bread you sanctify (we who by this bread you sanctify)
Draw the world for you to christify

Verse 5
We who by this bread you sanctify (we who by this bread you sanctify)
Draw the world for You to christify

offertory.title: Take, O Take Me As I Am
Gift of Finest Wheat
offertory.lyrics:
You satisfy the hungry heart
with gift of finest wheat,
come give to us, O saving Lord,
the bread of life to eat.

As when the grain by saints believed
was blessed and broken, Lord,
so may your Church in lands today
be fed, your praise restored.

O Lord of harvest, grant that we
who share this mystery here
may follow you unceasingly
in praise, in love, in fear.

One bread, one cup, one life, one Lord—
we offer, Christ, to you;
until we share your banquet board
where all the world is new.

offertory.title: I Am the Bread of Life
offertory.lyrics:
I am the Bread of life;
all who come to me shall not hunger,
and who believe in me shall not thirst.
No one can come to me unless
my Father beckons.

And I will raise them up,
and I will raise them up,
and I will raise them up on the last day.

The bread that I will give
is my flesh for the life of the world
and if you eat of this bread,
you shall live forever,
yes, live forever.

Unless you eat
of the flesh of the Son of Man
and drink of his blood,
and drink of his blood,
there is no life in you,
there is no life in you.

And I will raise them up,
and I will raise them up,
and I will raise them up on the last day.

offertory.title: One Bread, One Body
offertory.lyrics:
One bread, one body, one Lord of all,
one cup of blessing which we bless.
And we, though many, throughout the earth,
we are one body in this one Lord.

Gentile or Jew, servant or free,
woman or man, no more.

Many the gifts, many the works,
many the ways we serve;
many the moments, many the hours,
many the talents shared.

One bread, one body, one Lord of all,
one cup of blessing which we bless.
And we, though many, throughout the earth,
we are one body in this one Lord.

offertory.title: Doxology (Praise God from Whom All Blessings Flow)
Take My Life and Let It Be
offertory.lyrics:
Take my life and let it be
consecrated, Lord, to thee;
take my moments and my days,
let them flow in ceaseless praise.

Take my hands and let them move
at the impulse of thy love;
take my feet and let them be
swift and beautiful for thee.

Take my voice and let me sing
always, only, for my King;
take my lips and let them be
filled with messages from thee.

Take my silver and my gold,
not a mite would I withhold;
take my intellect and use
every power as thou shalt choose.

Take my will and make it thine,
it shall be no longer mine;
take my heart, it is thine own,
it shall be thy royal throne.

Take my love; my Lord, I pour
at thy feet its treasure-store;
take myself, and I will be
ever, only, all for thee.

offertory.title: We Give Thee But Thine Own
offertory.lyrics:
We give thee but thine own,
whate'er the gift may be;
all that we have is thine alone,
a trust, O Lord, from thee.

May we thy bounties thus
as stewards true receive,
and gladly, as thou blessest us,
to thee our firstfruits give.

To comfort and to bless,
to find a balm for woe,
to tend the lone and fatherless,
is angels' work below.

The captive to release,
to God the lost to bring,
to teach the way of life and peace,
it is a Christ-like thing.

offertory.title: Take Oh Lord This Offering
offertory.lyrics:
Verse 1
TAKE, OH LORD, THIS OFFERING
WITH HANDS OUTSTRETCH IMPLORING
TAKE, OH LORD, THIS SACRIFICE
AND LIFT IT TO THE SKIES

Verse 2
THIS HUMBLE LIFE WE OFFER
IN LOVING CARE PROTECT
WITH CONTRITE HEARTS WE PRAY TO YOU
YOUR MERCY GRANT US, LORD

Verse 3
LISTEN, LORD, THIS PRAY'R
WE SEND TO YOU ON HIGH
GRANT, OH LORD, TO THOSE WHO SEEK
THE SECRET OF YOUR LOVE

offertory.title: One More Gift
offertory.lyrics:
Chorus
If there's one more gift I'd ask of you, Lord
It would be peace here on earth
As gentle as your children's laughter
All around, all around

Verse 1
Your people have grown weary
Of living in confusion
When will we realize
That neither heaven is at peace?
When we will live not in peace

Chorus 2
If there's one more gift I'd ask of you, Lord
It would be peace here on earth
As gentle as your children's laughter
All around, all around

Verse 2
Grant me serenity, within
For the confusions around
Are mere reflections of what's within
What's within me

Chorus 3
If there's one more gift I'd ask of you, Lord
It would be peace here on earth
As gentle as your children's laughter
All around, all around

communion.title: Taste and See
communion.lyrics:
Taste and see the goodness of the Lord,
taste and see the goodness of the Lord.

I will bless the Lord at all times,
his praise shall be always in my mouth.

Taste and see the goodness of the Lord,
taste and see the goodness of the Lord.

Glorify the Lord with me,
let us exalt his name together.

Taste and see the goodness of the Lord,
taste and see the goodness of the Lord.

Look to him that you may be radiant with joy,
and your souls shall find their joy in him.

Taste and see the goodness of the Lord,
taste and see the goodness of the Lord.

communion.title: One Bread, One Body
communion.lyrics:
One bread, one body, one Lord of all,
one cup of blessing which we bless.
And we, though many, throughout the earth,
we are one body in this one Lord.

Gentile or Jew, servant or free,
woman or man, no more.

Many the gifts, many the works,
many the ways we serve.
Many the moments, many the hours,
many the talents shared.

One bread, one body, one Lord of all,
one cup of blessing which we bless.
And we, though many, throughout the earth,
we are one body in this one Lord.

communion.title: I Am the Bread of Life
communion.lyrics:
I am the Bread of life;
all who come to me shall not hunger,
and who believe in me shall not thirst.
No one can come to me unless
my Father beckons.

And I will raise them up,
and I will raise them up,
and I will raise them up on the last day.

The bread that I will give
is my flesh for the life of the world
and if you eat of this bread,
you shall live forever,
yes, live forever.

Unless you eat
of the flesh of the Son of Man
and drink of his blood,
and drink of his blood,
there is no life in you,
there is no life in you.

And I will raise them up,
and I will raise them up,
and I will raise them up on the last day.

communion.title: Eat This Bread
communion.lyrics:
Eat this bread,
drink this cup,
come to me and never be hungry.
Eat this bread,
drink this cup,
trust in me and you will not thirst.

If you eat this bread,
if you drink this cup,
you will have eternal life, eternal life.

Eat this bread,
drink this cup,
come to me and never be hungry.
Eat this bread,
drink this cup,
trust in me and you will not thirst.

Come! Come! Come to the feast of life.
Come! Come! Come to the Father's table.

Eat this bread,
drink this cup,
come to me and never be hungry.
Eat this bread,
drink this cup,
trust in me and you will not thirst.

communion.title: Table of Plenty
communion.lyrics:
Come to the feast of the Lord;
come to the table of plenty.
God will provide for all that we need,
here at the table of plenty.

O come and sit at my table,
for here you will comfort the poor,
and with the hungry share humble fare:
come and know life forevermore.

O how abundant the welcome
that God has prepared for the least:
let all who are lonely and lost be restored
at this table of love.

Come to the feast of the Lord;
come to the table of plenty.
God will provide for all that we need,
here at the table of plenty.

This is the bread of rememberance,
the cup of the covenant poured.
Taste and see how the Father adores:
we are his own.

communion.title: Let Us Break Bread Together
communion.lyrics:
Let us break bread together on our knees,
let us break bread together on our knees.
When I fall on my knees,
with my face to the rising sun,
O Lord, have mercy on me.

Let us drink wine together on our knees,
let us drink wine together on our knees.
When I fall on my knees,
with my face to the rising sun,
O Lord, have mercy on me.

Let us praise God together on our knees,
let us praise God together on our knees.
When I fall on my knees,
with my face to the rising sun,
O Lord, have mercy on me.

communion.title: Jesus, My Lord, My God, My All
communion.lyrics:
Jesus, my Lord, my God, my All,
hear me, blest Savior, when I call;
hear me, and from thy dwelling place,
pour down the riches of thy grace.

Jesus, too late I thee have sought,
how can I love thee as I ought?
And how extol thy matchless fame,
the glorious beauty of thy name?

Jesus, what didst thou find in me,
that thou hast dealt so lovingly?
How great the joy that thou hast brought,
so far exceeding hope or thought.

Jesus, my Lord, I thee adore,
O make me love thee more and more,
O make me love thee more and more.

communion.title: Soul of My Savior
communion.lyrics:
Soul of my Savior, sanctify my breast,
body of Christ, be thou my saving guest;
blood of my Savior, bathe me in thy tide,
wash me with water flowing from thy side.

Strength and protection may thy passion be,
O blessed Jesus, hear and answer me;
deep in thy wounds, Lord, hide and shelter me,
so shall I never, never part from thee.

Guard and defend me from the foe malign,
in death's dread moments make me only thine;
call me and bid me come to thee on high,
where I may praise thee with thy saints for aye.

communion.title: Be Not Afraid
communion.lyrics:
Verse 1
You shall cross the barrenn desert
But you shall not die of thirst
You shall wander far in safety
Though you do not know the way
You shall speak your words to foreign men
And they will understand
You shall see the face of God and live

Verse 2
Be not afraid
I go before you always
Come, follow me and I will give you rest

Verse 3
If you pass through raging waters in the sea
You shall not drown
If you walk amid the burning flames
You shall not be harmed
If you stand before the power of hell
And death is at your side
Know that I am with you through it all

Verse 4
Be not afraid
I go before you always
Come, follow me and I will give you rest

Verse 5
And blessed are your poor
For the kingdom shall be theirs
Blest are you that weep and mourn
For one day you shall laugh
And if wicked men insult and hate you
All because of me
Blessed, blessed are you

Verse 6
Be not afraid
I go before you always
Come, follow me and I will give you rest

communion.title: Iesu Panis Vitae
communion.author: Bukas Palad Ministry
communion.lyrics:
Chorus
Iesu, Panis Vitae, Donum Patris.
Iesu, Fons Vitae, Fons Vitae Aquae.
Cibus et potus noster,
Cibus et potus noster
in itinere, in itinere ad domum Dei.

Verse 1
Mula sa lupa, sumibol kang masigla,
matapos kang yurakan ng mga masasama.
Sumilang ang liwanag ng mga nawawala,
Tinapay ng Buhay, Pagkain ng dukha.

Chorus 2
Iesu, Panis Vitae, Donum Patris.
Iesu, Fons Vitae, Fons Vitae Aquae.
Cibus et potus noster,
Cibus et potus noster
in itinere, in itinere ad domum Dei.

Verse 2
Jesus, Food divine, be our strength each day,
so we don’t tire as we witness to your love and care
to those in greater need, both near and far away.
May we lead them back to you, all those who’ve gone astray.

Chorus 3
Iesu, Panis Vitae, Donum Patris.
Iesu, Fons Vitae, Fons Vitae Aquae.
Cibus et potus noster,
Cibus et potus noster
in itinere, in itinere ad domum Dei.

Verse 3
En la vida, Jesus, sea nuestro Consuelo.
Sea nuestro Amigo y Companero.
Siempre podamos responder a su Llamada.
Siempre dispuesto a hacer tu Voluntad.

Chorus 4
Iesu, Panis Vitae, Donum Patris.
Iesu, Fons Vitae, Fons Vitae Aquae.
Cibus et potus noster,
Cibus et potus noster
in itinere, in itinere ad domum Dei.

communion.title: Manalig Ka
communion.author: Tinig San Jose
communion.lyrics:
Verse 1
Iluom lahat ng takot sa iyong damdamin
Ang pangalan n'ya lagi ang tawagin
At siya'y nakikinig
Sa bawat hinaing

Verse 2
Magmasid
At mamulat sa kanyang kapangyarihan
Nabatid mo ba na siya'y naglalaan
Patuloy na naghahatid ng tunay na kalayaan

Chorus
Manalig ka
Tuyuin ang luha sa mga mata
Hindi siya panaginip
Hindi siya isang pangarap
Siya ay buhay manalig ka

Verse 4
Ang ngayon tila walang mararating na bukas
Ngunit kung siya ang ating hayaang maglandas
Pag-asa ay muling mabibigkas

Chorus
Manalig ka
Tuyuin ang luha sa mga mata
Hindi siya panaginip
Hindi siya isang pangarap
Siya ay buhay manalig ka

Verse 6
Manalig ka
Tuyuin ang luha sa mga mata
Hindi siya natutulog
Hindi nakakalimot
Kay Hesus manalig ka
Kay Hesus manalig ka

communion.title: You are Mine
communion.author: David Haas
communion.lyrics:
Verse 1
[Verse 1]
I will come to you in the silence
I will lift you from all your fear
You will hear My voice
I claim you as My choice
Be still, and know I am near

Verse 2
[Verse 2]
I am hope for all who are hopeless
I am eyes for all who long to see
In the shadows of the night
I will be your light
Come and rest in Me

Verse 3
[Chorus]
Do not be afraid, I am with you
I have called you each by name
Come and follow Me
I will bring you home
I love you and you are mine

Verse 4
[Verse 3]
I am strength for all the despairing
Healing for the ones who dwell in shame
All the blind will see, the lame will all run free
And all will know My name

Verse 5
[Chorus]
Do not be afraid, I am with you
I have called you each by name
Come and follow Me
I will bring you home
I love you and you are mine

Verse 5
[Verse 4]
I am the Word that leads all to freedom
I am the peace the world cannot give
I will call your name, embracing all your pain
Stand up, now, walk, and live

Verse 6
[Chorus]
Do not be afraid, I am with you
I have called you each by name
Come and follow Me
I will bring you home
I love you and you are mine

communion.title: Isang Bansa
communion.lyrics:
Response
Oh kay ganda ng ating buhay
Napupuspos ng pagpapala
Ng sakramentong mahiwaga
Kaloob ni Hesus sa’ting Gabay

Verse 1
Oh kay tamis ng pagsasama
Nagmumula sa pagkakaisa
Bumubukal sa pagsasalo
Sa iisang hapag ay dumalo

Response 2
Purihin si Hesus sa sakramento
Purihin ng lahat ng tao
Purihin siya ng Pilipino
Sa pagkakaisa’y lingapin mo

communion.title: Anima Christi
communion.lyrics:
Verse 1
[Verse 1]
Soul of Christ, sanctify me
Body of Christ, save me
Water from the side of Christ, wash me
Passion of Christ, give me strength

Chorus
[Pre-Chorus]
Hear me Jesus, hide me in Thy wounds
That I may never leave Thy side

Chorus 2
[Chorus]
From all the evil that surrounds me, defend me
And when the call of death arrives, bid me come to Thee
That I may praise Thee with Thy saints forever

Chorus 3
[Pre-Chorus]
Hear me Jesus, hide me in Thy wounds
That I may never lеave Thy side

Chorus 4
[Chorus]
From all the еvil that surrounds me, defend me
And when the call of death arrives, bid me come to Thee
That I may praise Thee with Thy saints forever

communion.title: Make Me a Channel of Your PEace
communion.lyrics:
Verse 1
Make me a channel of your peace.
Where there is hatred let me bring your love.
Where there is injury, your pardon, Lord
And where there's doubt, true faith in you.

Verse 2
Make me a channel of your peace
Where there's despair in life, let me bring hope
Where there is darkness, only light
And where there's sadness, ever joy.

Verse 3
Oh, Master grant that I may never seek
So much to be consoled as to console
To be understood as to understand
To be loved as to love with all my soul.

Verse 4
Make me a channel of your peace
It is in pardoning that we are pardoned
In giving to all men that we receive
And in dying that we're born to eternal life.

Verse 5
Oh, Master grant that I may never seek
So much to be consoled as to console
To be understood as to understand
To be loved as to love with all my soul.

Verse 6
Make me a channel of your peace
It is in pardoning that we are pardoned
In giving to all men that we receive
And in dying that we're born to eternal life.

communion.title: Pagsibol
communion.lyrics:
Verse 1
Bawat huni ng ibon sa pag-ihip ng amihan
Wangis Mo'y aking natatanaw
Pagdampi ng umaga sa nanlamig kong kalamnan
Init Mo'y pangarap kong hagkan

Verse 2
Panginoon, Ikaw ang kasibulan ng buhay
Puso'y dalisay kailan pa man
Ipahintulot Mong ako'y mapahandusay
Sa sumasaibayong kaginhawahan

Verse 3
Nangungulilang malay binulungan ng tinig Mong
Nagdulot ng katiwasayan
Paghahanap katwiran, nilusaw Mo sa simbuyong
Karilagan ng pagmamahal

Chorus
Panginoon, Ikaw ang kasibulan ng buhay
Puso'y dalisay kailan pa man
Ipahintulot Mong ako'y mapahandusay
Sa sumasaibayong kaginhawahan

Chorus 2
Panginoon, Ikaw ang kasibulan ng buhay
Puso'y dalisay kailan pa man
Ipahintulot Mong ako'y mapahandusay
Sa sumasaibayong kaginhawahan

Verse 4
Dalangin pa sana'y mapagtanto kong tunay
Kaganapan ng buhay ko'y Ikaw lamang

recessional.title: We Are Called
recessional.lyrics:
We are called to act with justice,
we are called to love tenderly;
we are called to serve one another,
to walk humbly with God.

Come! live in the light!
Shine with the joy and the love of the Lord!

God of daybreak, God of shadow,
come into our restless lives;
lift from us the fear of shadows,
that we may arise with light.

We are called to act with justice...

Come! live in the light!...

God of newness, God of freshness,
come into our morning song:
give to us a new beginning,
send us forth with hearts made strong.

We are called to act with justice...

Come! live in the light!...

recessional.title: Go Make a Difference
recessional.lyrics:
Go make a difference;
we can make a difference
in the name of the Lord.

We are sent in the power of love,
bearing peace like a pure, holy dove
to every nation, every land.
Go make a difference.

Go make a difference;
we can make a difference
in the name of the Lord.

We are the salt of the earth,
called to give the world a new taste:
love, justice, mercy, and praise.
Go make a difference.

Go make a difference;
we can make a difference
in the name of the Lord.

We are a light on the hill,
may our good deeds shine, Lord, until
all know your kingdom is near.
Go make a difference.

recessional.title: City of God
recessional.lyrics:
Verse 1
Awake from your slumber
Arise from your sleep
A new day is dawning
For all those who weep

Verse 2
The people in darkness
Have seen a great light
The Lord of our longing
Has conquered the night

Chorus
Let us build the city of God
May our tears be turned into dancing
For the Lord, our light and our love
Has turned the night into day

Verse 3
We are sons of the morning
We are daughters of day
The One who has loved us
Has brightened our way

Chorus 2
Let us build the city of God
May our tears be turned into dancing
For the Lord, our light and our love
Has turned the night into day

Verse 4
God is light
In Him there is no darkness
Let us walk in His light
His children one and all

Verse 5
Oh, comfort my people
Make gentle your words
Proclaim to my city
The day of her birth

Chorus 3
Let us build the city of God
May our tears be turned into dancing
For the Lord, our light and our love
Has turned the night into day

recessional.title: Alleluia! Sing to Jesus
recessional.lyrics:
Alleluia! Sing to Jesus!
His the scepter, his the throne;
alleluia! His the triumph,
his the victory alone.

Hark! the songs of peaceful Zion
thunder like a mighty flood;
Jesus out of every nation
hath redeemed us by his blood.

Alleluia! Not as orphans
are we left in sorrow sore;
one with love exceeding father,
one with love exceeding mother,
he hath gone before.

Alleluia! Bread of angels,
thou on earth our food, our stay;
alleluia! here the sinful
to thy presence sing alway.

Alleluia! King eternal,
thou the Lord whom we adore;
alleluia! Son and Father,
Holy Spirit, one forevermore,
we would bow before.

Alleluia! Sing to Jesus!
His the scepter, his the throne;
alleluia! His the triumph,
his the victory alone.

recessional.title: Lead Me, Lord
recessional.lyrics:
Lead me, Lord, lead me in thy righteousness,
make thy way plain before my face.

For it is thou, Lord, thou, Lord only,
that makest me dwell in safety.

Guide me, Lord, guide me when I am weary,
be my strength when shadows fall.

Turn my heart to thy holy word,
be my keeper, be my Lord.

Lead me, Lord, lead me in thy righteousness,
make thy way plain before my face.

In thy light we see light;
in thy truth we find our way.
Be our refuge and our fortress,
be our strength from day to day.

Lead me, Lord, lead me in thy righteousness,
make thy way plain before my face.

recessional.title: To Jesus Christ, Our Sovereign King
recessional.lyrics:
To Jesus Christ, our Sovereign King,
who is the world's salvation,
all praise and homage do we bring,
and thanks and adoration.
Christ Jesus, Victor!
Christ Jesus, Ruler!
Christ Jesus, Lord and Redeemer!

Your reign extend, O King benign,
to every land and nation,
for in your kingdom, Lord divine,
alone we find salvation.
Christ Jesus, Victor!
Christ Jesus, Ruler!
Christ Jesus, Lord and Redeemer!

When this our life of trials is past,
bring us to your kingdom,
where glory, joy and peace will last,
for all who know your freedom.
Christ Jesus, Victor!
Christ Jesus, Ruler!
Christ Jesus, Lord and Redeemer!

recessional.title: God of Our Fathers
Onward, Christian Soldiers
recessional.lyrics:
Onward, Christian soldiers,
marching as to war,
with the cross of Jesus
going on before.
Christ, the royal Master,
leads against the foe;
forward into battle,
see his banners go!

Onward, Christian soldiers,
marching as to war,
with the cross of Jesus
going on before.

Like a mighty army
moves the Church of God;
brothers, we are treading
where the saints have trod.
We are not divided,
all one body we,
one in hope and doctrine,
one in charity.

Onward, Christian soldiers,
marching as to war,
with the cross of Jesus
going on before.

recessional.title: Shine Jesus Shine
recessional.lyrics:
Verse 1
Lord, the light of Your love is shining
In the midst of the darkness, shining
Jesus, light of the world, shine upon us
Set us free by the truth You now bring us
Shine on me, shine on me

Verse 2
Shine, Jesus, shine, fill this land with the Father's glory
Blaze, Spirit, blaze, set our hearts on fire
Flow, river, flow, flood the nations with grace and mercy
Send forth Your word, Lord, and let there be light

Verse 3
Lord, I come to Your awesome presence
From the shadows into Your radiance
By the blood, I may enter Your brightness
Search me, try me, consume all my darkness
Shine on me, shine on me

Verse 4
Shine, Jesus, shine, fill this land with the Father's glory
Blaze, Spirit, blaze, set our hearts on fire
Flow, river, flow, flood the nations with grace and mercy
Send forth Your word, Lord, and let there be light

Verse 3 copy
As we gaze on Your kingly brightness
So our faces display Your likeness
Ever changing from glory to glory
Mirrored here, may our lives tell Your story
Shine on me, shine on me

Verse 5
Shine, Jesus, shine, fill this land with the Father's glory
Blaze, Spirit, blaze, set our hearts on fire
Flow, river, flow, flood the nations with grace and mercy
Send forth Your word, Lord, and let, let there be light
Shine, Jesus, shine, fill this land with the Father's glory
Blaze, Spirit, blaze, set our hearts, set them on fire
Flow, river, flow, flood the nations with grace and mercy
Send forth Your word, Lord, and let there be light!

Verse 6
Lord, let there be light!
Let there be light!

recessional.title: Halina't Humayag
recessional.lyrics:
Verse 1
Humayo't ihayag (Purihin Siya!)
At ating ibunyag (Awitan Siya!)
Pagliligtas ng Diyos na sa krus ni Hesus
Ang Siyang sa mundo'y tumubos

Verse 2
Langit at lupa, Siya'y papurihan
Araw at tala, Siya'y parangalan
Ating 'pagdiwang pag-ibig ng Diyos sa tanan
Aleluya

Verse 3
Halina't sumayaw (Buong bayan!)
Lukso sabay sigaw (Sanlibutan!)
Ang ngalan Niyang angkin singningning ng bituin
Liwanag ng Diyos sumaatin (KORO)

Verse 2
Langit at lupa, Siya'y papurihan
Araw at tala, Siya'y parangalan
Ating 'pagdiwang pag-ibig ng Diyos sa tanan
Aleluya

Verse 4
At isigaw sa lahat
Kalinga Niya'y wagas
Kayong dukha't salat
Pag-ibig Niya sa inyo at tapat

recessional.title: Covenant Journey
recessional.lyrics:
Verse 1
Let me walk with you, as I journey to this land
Searching for a meaning as each moment passes by
Let the hand of time be like footprints in the sand
As I carry you from the dawn to the setting sun.

Chorus
With just one hand we can travel far together
One’s life sharing in love
I will hold you forever
Yes, I love you with all my heart.

Verse 2
There’ll be many crossroads as we walk  along the way
There’ll be many questions as we live life day by day
This will never matter if the Lord is always there
He will surely find the answers just because he cares

recessional.title: All The Ends Of The World
recessional.lyrics:
Verse 1
All the ends of the earth, all you creatures of the sea,
lift up your eyes to the wonders of the Lord.
For the Lord of the earth, the Master of the sea,
has come with justice for the world.
Break into song at the deeds of the Lord,
the wonders God has done in every age.

Verse 2
All the ends of the earth, all you creatures of the sea,
lift up your eyes to the wonders of the Lord.
For the Lord of the earth, the Master of the sea,
has come with justice for the world.
Heaven and earth shall rejoice in your might;
every heart, every nation call you Lord.

Verse 3
All the ends of the earth, all you creatures of the sea,
lift up your eyes to the wonders of the Lord.
For the Lord of the earth, the Master of the sea,
has come with justice for the world.
The Lord has made salvation known,
faithful to the promises of old.
Let the ends of the earth, let the sea
and all it holds make music before our God!

meditation.title: Pananaghoy (Meditation)
meditation.lyrics: (Add verses when available — optional post-Communion meditation.)
